title: Invisible Armor
description: An EXTREMELY low quality mod that I made with MC creator in like 20 mins to make invisible armor pieces crafted with glass blocks to fix an issue I was having with Create's engineers goggles in first person with the first person model mod (didn't work)
body:
An EXTREMELY low quality mod that I made with MC creator in like 20 mins to make invisible armor pieces crafted with glass blocks to go in the cosmetic armor slot. This was to fix the issue of create's engineering goggles showing in first person with the first person model mod (this didnt work because the cosmetic armor slot only overrides whatever is in your main armor slot, not the slot made for the create goggles) but here it is for people who want to hide their armor anyways

p.s. if you are having the same issue as I was, I threw this in and it worked (also works for later versions, I'm using it in 1.20.1)

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-invis-goggles
